entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for yield stability and productivity under water-limited conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A water-limited condition that causes yield losses in crops

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of a crop, which is negatively impacted by drought

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS FACTORS
entities.description: Biological factors that cause stress to crops, compared to the impact of drought

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output, examined in relation to drought resistance

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or adapt to water-limited conditions

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Timing of life cycle events used by sorghum to adapt to drought

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Physical structural changes used by sorghum to adapt to drought

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Functional biological changes used by sorghum to adapt to drought

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Chemical process changes used by sorghum to adapt to drought

entities.name: SCREENING METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to identify and evaluate drought resistance

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genetic characteristics used to improve drought resistance

entities.name: BREEDING METHODS
entities.description: Strategies used to develop crop varieties with improved drought resistance and yield

entities.name: TRANSPIRATIONAL WATER USE
entities.description: The amount of water lost through transpiration, targeted for increase to improve yield

entities.name: DROUGHT INJURY
entities.description: Damage caused to the plant by water-limited conditions
